hero.subtitle: I help real estate agencies, developers and designers reveal the true potential of interiors. Professional imagery means faster sales and higher property value.

about.label: About me
about.title:
I visualise space
to reveal its character.
about.p1: I specialise in interior, architecture and premium real estate photography. My goal is not just to "take a photo" but to tell the story of a place so that it attracts the ideal client.
about.p2: Through precise light control and careful post-processing I help agents, developers and interior designers build a strong brand in the industry.

portfolio.subtitle: Frames that accelerated property sales and enhanced designers' portfolios.

faq.title: FAQ & Terms of Cooperation
faq.q1: How long does a standard session take?
faq.a1: For an apartment up to 80m² a session usually takes about 1.5–2 hours. Larger homes or "Designer Day" sessions can last from 3 to 8 hours depending on requirements.
faq.q2: When will I receive the finished photos?
faq.a2: Professionally retouched photos are usually delivered within 48–72 hours of the client selecting the frames.
faq.q3: What usage rights do I receive?
faq.a3: You receive a licence to use the photos for promotional and property sales purposes (websites, listing portals, social media). Moral rights remain with me.
faq.a4: Yes, I hold the required licences and offer drone photography, which perfectly complements the presentation of houses and plots. This option is available in the Premium package.
faq.extra1_desc: 20 PLN / each shot beyond the package.

contact.title: Let's make a great project.
contact.subtitle: Book a session date or ask a question. I usually reply within 24 hours.
contact.field_message_ph: Briefly describe your project (e.g. 60m² rental apartment, Warsaw)...
contact.rodo: I consent to the processing of my personal data for contact and query handling purposes. (GDPR)
